utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 6 items required by the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. In the provided final property solution, I see: selected_property (which maps to property), financing, legal_services, moving_services (incomplete and missing closing brace/content), and no setup_services, no total_budget. Now, check full specification per item: 
- property: present (selected_property) with description and price — sufficiently specified. 
- financing: present with type, interest rate range, term, down payment, fee — sufficiently specified. 
- legal_services: present with package, details, cost — sufficiently specified. 
- moving_services: present but incomplete (JSON truncates after details, no cost provided and the object seems unfinished). Not fully specified. 
- setup_services: missing. 
- total_budget: missing. 
Thus, 3 out of 6 items are fully specified.
